title: Teriyaki Pork Rice Bowl
description: Fragrant jasmine rice topped with savoury teriyaki pork mince, tender broccolini, and kale with a sesame soy drizzle.

steps.instruction: Bring 300ml salted water to a boil, add rice, cover and simmer for 12 minutes, then rest covered for 12 minutes.
Strip kale leaves from stems, halve broccolini lengthways, and mix aioli with half the soy sauce in a small bowl.
Brown pork mince with lemongrass paste over medium-high heat for 5–6 minutes.
Add broccolini, kale, and sesame seeds; stir in teriyaki sauce, remaining soy sauce, and a splash of water; cover for 6–8 minutes.
Fluff rice and divide between bowls with the pork and vegetable mixture.
Drizzle soy aioli over the vegetables and serve immediately.
